draft_vendor_email.subject: Action Required: Compliance Issue with Invoice 2017-40
draft_vendor_email.body:
Dear VERVE Financial Services Private Limited team,

We are writing to bring to your attention a compliance issue with invoice #2017-40, dated [insert date]. Our system has flagged this invoice due to a non-standard GSTIN format.

Specifically, the GSTIN provided on the invoice does not conform to the standard 15-digit format. We require a valid GSTIN to process payments and ensure compliance with regulatory requirements.

To facilitate timely payment, we kindly request that you provide a corrected version of the invoice with the accurate GSTIN information.

Please find the details of the invoice in question below:
- Invoice #: 2017-40
- Total Amount: 4899.36 INR

We appreciate your prompt attention to this matter, and look forward to receiving the corrected invoice.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
Compliance Team, CompliancePilot AI

draft_vendor_email.subject: Action Required: Compliance Issue with Invoice 1234
draft_vendor_email.body:
Dear RZ ELECTRONICS team,

We are writing to bring to your attention a compliance issue with invoice #1234, dated [insert date]. Our system has flagged this invoice due to a non-standard Vendor GSTIN format. Upon reviewing the invoice, we detected an invalid GSTIN format.

To process payment for this invoice, we kindly request that you provide a corrected version of the invoice with the accurate GSTIN information in the standard format.

Please find the details of the invoice below:
- Invoice #: 1234
- Total Amount: 11800 INR

We appreciate your prompt attention to this matter, and we look forward to receiving the corrected invoice from you soon.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
Compliance Team, CompliancePilot AI
